summary: v2.5.26 backend validation — Path B observability (logs + template-keyed counter), admin metrics endpoint, partial-post detection (BC service + auto-post path + true E2E financial-integrity), full regression. All 8 review-request bullets PASS. 115 passed, 3 skipped (concurrency tests skipped by design) — exact expected count.

minor.issue: days=0 returns a non-200 / error payload (KeyError 'route_totals' when parsed). Likely intentional (window must be >=1) but no documented behavior. Cosmetic.

critical_code_review_comments: Pydantic body validation runs BEFORE the _deprecate() wrapper, so requests with malformed bodies (HTTP 422) are NOT recorded in deprecation_hits and do NOT emit [DEPRECATED] WARNING log lines. In practice this is fine — real Path B callers send valid bodies — but if the user wants 100% visibility into deprecated-route discovery (incl. broken clients), consider moving the deprecation hit recorder to a middleware layer keyed on the route TEMPLATE before request body parsing. Not blocking for v2.5.26.

Phase 4 plan artifact /app/memory/PATH_B_REMOVAL_PLAN.md is complete and concrete: enumerates the 6 routes to delete, the 3 orphan server.py functions (start_approval_generic / approve_generic / reject_generic, lines L6590-6760), the 7-day zero-hits gate measured via /api/admin/deprecation-metrics, rollback procedure (single-commit revert), and sequencing timeline (T+0 ship → T+7 checkpoint → T+8 Phase 4 PR → T+14 helper deletion). Meets all four user directives.
test_credentials: hub-admin@gamerpackaging.com / ChangeMeOnFirstDeploy-K8p2q (login verified — JWT 281 chars issued; /api/admin/deprecation-metrics 401 without JWT, 200 with JWT)
seed_data_creation: None. Used throwaway doc_ids (smk-1..smk-5, doc-A/B/C, smoke-*). deprecation_hits collection wiped before and after to keep counts clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.5.26 is GREEN. Path B observability live: every wrapper-reaching POST to /api/workflows/ap_invoice/{id}/{set-vendor|update-fields|override-bc-validation|start-approval|approve|reject} emits a 'routers.workflows - WARNING - [DEPRECATED] METHOD PATH -> canonical CANONICAL_PATH status=N client=IP auth=BOOL ua=UA' line and increments db.deprecation_hits keyed by route TEMPLATE (not substituted URL). Aggregation verified: 3x /approve with doc-A/doc-B/doc-C produced one row with total_hits=3, last_instance_path tracked separately in daily_breakdown. /api/admin/deprecation-metrics: 401 anon, 200 with admin JWT, returns {window_days, since_day_bucket, as_of_utc, route_totals[], daily_breakdown[]}. days=N query param honored (days=7 → since 2026-04-15; days=1 → today only). Note for next iteration: Pydantic 422 hits are NOT recorded (body parse failure short-circuits before wrapper) — this is acceptable per current scope but flagged as a potential observability gap for production use cases involving malformed clients. Phase 4 removal plan exists, gated on 7-day zero-hits window measured via the metrics endpoint.

validated_review_bullets.1_path_b_warning_log_lines: PASS — backend.err.log shows '[DEPRECATED] POST <path> -> canonical <canonical> status=N client=IP auth=BOOL ua=UA' for every wrapper-reaching hit (verified 14 lines incl. test suite + smoke curls).
validated_review_bullets.2_template_keyed_counter_aggregation: PASS — 3x POST to /api/workflows/ap_invoice/{doc-A,doc-B,doc-C}/approve produced ONE deprecation_hits row with deprecated_path='/api/workflows/ap_invoice/{doc_id}/approve' and total_hits=3.
validated_review_bullets.3_admin_metrics_auth_and_template_covera: PASS — 401 without JWT, 200 with admin JWT, all 6 AP mutation templates visible in route_totals after one valid-body hit each, days=7 / days=1 windows honored.
validated_review_bullets.5_auto_post_partial_post_flips_success_f: PASS — test_auto_post_path_detects_partial_post_and_flips_success_false green; bc_purchase_invoice.success=False, lines_added=0, lines_total=2, error_message starts with 'partial_post:'.
validated_review_bullets.6_e2e_financial_integrity: PASS — test_ap_auto_post_service_does_not_mark_posted_on_partial_post green; on partial-post, attempt_ap_auto_post NEVER writes bc_posting_status='posted', workflow_status='posted', or status='Posted'; result.posted is not True.
validated_review_bullets.7_full_regression: PASS — 115 passed, 3 skipped (concurrency tests skipped by design). Exact expected count from review request.
validated_review_bullets.8_phase_4_plan_artifact: PASS — /app/memory/PATH_B_REMOVAL_PLAN.md present, enumerates 6 deprecated routes, 3 orphan functions in server.py (lines 6590-6760), 7-day zero-hits gate via /api/admin/deprecation-metrics, rollback procedure (single revert commit), and T+0..T+14 sequencing timeline.

test_run_summary.test_ap_path_consolidation.py: 32 passed / 0 failed (header-tests changed wording vs the 36 reported earlier — current suite has 32 cases, all green)

rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in the v2.5.26 surface. Only one minor cosmetic observation: HTTP 422 (Pydantic body-validation) hits are not recorded by the deprecation wrapper because FastAPI runs body validation before the route handler executes. This is a non-blocker for v2.5.26 as documented above.
